use_cases: Display contextual information with dismissible behavior for user onboarding flows
Show product feature highlights or tips in SaaS applications
Present announcements or notifications that users can dismiss permanently or temporarily
Contain media (images/videos) alongside descriptive text in a card layout
Provide persistent user guidance with localStorage-based memory of dismissal state
ai_summary: A versatile, dismissible info card component with support for titles, descriptions, media content, and footer actions. Built with motion/react for smooth animations and localStorage persistence for dismiss state management. Features a modular sub-component architecture including InfoCardTitle, InfoCardDescription, InfoCardContent, InfoCardMedia, InfoCardFooter, and InfoCardDismiss for flexible composition. Ideal for onboarding tooltips, feature announcements, and contextual user guidance in SaaS and e-commerce platforms.
